page_description: A configurable bash project generator with templates
logo: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#86efac" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/></svg>
project_tagline: Generate bash projects from templates with ease
install_command:
git clone https://github.com/butter-sh/hammer.sh.git
cd hammer.sh
chmod +x hammer.sh
install_steps: Clone the repository,Make hammer.sh executable,Run hammer.sh to generate a project
features: Multiple project templates,Variable substitution,File overwrite protection,Easy customization,Extensible template system,Beautiful CLI output
usage_example:
# Generate an arty.sh project
./hammer.sh arty my-library

# Generate with custom variables
./hammer.sh starter my-app -v author="John Doe" -v license=MIT

# Generate in custom directory
./hammer.sh arty my-lib --dir ./projects

# List available templates
./hammer.sh --list
related_projects: [{"url":"https://github.com/butter-sh/arty.sh","label":"arty.sh","desc":"Library manager for bash projects"},{"url":"https://github.com/butter-sh/leaf.sh","label":"leaf.sh","desc":"Generate beautiful documentation"},{"url":"https://github.com/butter-sh/myst.sh","label":"myst.sh","desc":"Templating engine with mustache syntax"}]
